# TCB Pest Control Canberra

> Family-run, fully licensed and insured pest control company servicing homes and businesses across the ACT and surrounding NSW (Queanbeyan). Same technician where possible, written report after every visit, family-safe products. Services include general pest control, termite treatment and inspection, ant, spider, rodent, cockroach, flea, bee, silverfish, bird, possum and stored-product-pest control, for residential and commercial customers.

## Services

- [Residential Pest Control](/residential): General home pest control plans and one-off treatments.
- [Commercial Pest Control](/commercial): Pest management for businesses, retail, hospitality and strata.
- [Pests We Treat](/pests-we-treat): Overview of every pest type serviced.
- [Termite Treatment & Inspection](/termite-treatment): Termite inspections, barriers and treatment.
- [Rodent Control](/rodent-control): Rat and mouse baiting and proofing.
- [Ant Control](/pest-control-for-ants): Ant treatment for homes and businesses.
- [Spider Control](/spider-control.html): Spider treatment including redbacks and funnel-webs.
- [Bee Control](/bees): Bee removal and hive relocation.
- [Cockroach Control](/cockroach-control.html): German and American cockroach treatment.
- [Flea Control](/flea-control.html): Flea treatment for homes and pets' environments.
- [Silverfish Control](/silverfish-control): Silverfish treatment.
- [Bird Control](/bird-control.html): Bird proofing and deterrents.
- [Possum Control](/possum-control.html): Possum removal and exclusion.
- [Stored Product Pest Control](/stored-product-pest-control.html): Pantry and stored-product pest treatment.
